title: Cartoon and Animation Mission and Vision
content:
Cartoon and Animation Mission and Vision

Mission:

The department's main mission is to train practitioners with a solid intellectual foundation in the field of cartoons and animation. This mission guided the creation of the department's curriculum structure. The department offers an education program that synthesizes theoretical and applied knowledge. The Cartoon and Animation department equips its graduates with the knowledge and skills needed in relevant sectoral fields.

Vision:

Animation is a profession that is not only relevant today but also holds significant promise for the future. At the highest level, the department leverages advanced digital technological opportunities, equipping students with the knowledge and skills required for animation applications. The Cartoon and Animation Department, with its well-equipped academic staff, aims to train professionals who will create brand value on an international scale in the near future.
